title: Can You Pay Off a Reverse Mortgage Early? (Prepayment Penalties)
description: Exploring your rights to repay a reverse mortgage early and why there are no prepayment penalties.

title: Proprietary (Jumbo) Reverse Mortgages: Costs and Differences
description: How the costs of a private, jumbo reverse mortgage differ from a federally-insured HECM for high-value homes.

title: The Hidden 'Cost': Property Taxes and Homeowners Insurance
description: Why you must continue to pay property taxes and insurance on a reverse mortgage, and what happens if you default.

title: Reverse Mortgage Servicing Fees: Are They Still Charged?
description: An explanation of monthly servicing fees on reverse mortgages and why most lenders in 2024 have eliminated them.

title: Reverse Mortgage Interest Rates: Fixed vs. Variable
description: How interest rates work on a reverse mortgage, the difference between fixed and adjustable rates, and how it impacts your loan balance.

title: Title, Recording, and Closing Fees on a Reverse Mortgage
description: A breakdown of the third-party closing costs associated with a reverse mortgage, including title insurance and recording fees.

title: Reverse Mortgage Counseling: Costs and What to Expect
description: Learn about mandatory HUD counseling for reverse mortgages, how much it costs, and why it is a crucial consumer protection step.

title: The Upfront MIP: Decoding the HECM Mortgage Insurance Premium
description: A detailed explanation of the 2% upfront FHA Mortgage Insurance Premium, why it exists, and how it protects you.

title: Reverse Mortgage Appraisal Costs: Expected Fees in 2024
description: Everything you need to know about FHA appraisal requirements, costs, and the dreaded 'second appraisal' rule.

title: Understanding HECM Origination Fees: What You Actually Pay
description: A deep dive into how reverse mortgage origination fees are calculated by HUD, state caps, and how to negotiate them.
